trans-unit.source: Delete "" together with all its batches, withdrawals and notes? This action cannot be undone.
Cannot delete: there are still open withdrawals to return.
Minimum Stock is required and must be non-negative.
Drag and drop locations to reorganize the structure.
Customize the look and feel of the application.
Switch between light and dark theme.
Check for and install application updates.
Updates are only available in the packaged app, not in development mode.
Manage database and data state. These actions cannot be undone.
You are on the latest version.
Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
Database has been reset. Please restart the app.
This will add mock data to the database. Continue?
This will overwrite your current data. Are you sure you want to continue?
Backup imported successfully. Please restart the application.
How many of the returned items are inefficient?
This withdrawal was marked as consumed. Restock item(s) anyway?
